##### About me

I created Mama Bare Doula LLC out of a passion for walking alongside mothers and families during one of the most meaningful times of their lives. My philosophy is simple: every mother deserves to feel supported, cared for, and confident from pregnancy through postpartum. I believe birth is not only about bringing a baby into the world but also about nurturing and strengthening the mother. My role is to provide comfort, advocacy, and encouragement while helping families embrace their unique journey. Whether you are preparing for birth at home, in a birth center, or in the hospital, I am committed to honoring your choices and holding space for your story while offering continuous care and heartfelt support.

##### Education

Na (2022)

##### Specialties

Birth DoulaBirth SupportBreastfeeding Assistance and SupportLabor DoulaParenting SupportPositive ThinkingPostpartum CarePostpartum Doula CarePostpartum Life

Show less


Show the rest


##### Languages

##### Service introduction

Motherhood is sacred and so is your story. I’m here to offer gentle guidance, support, and love from pregnancy to postpartum.

##### Packages

Basic package

Basic Birth Doula Package – $1,200 • Two prenatal visits to prepare for birth, discuss preferences, and practice comfort techniques • Unlimited phone, text, and email support throughout pregnancy • On-call availability beginning at 38 weeks until birth • Continuous labor and birth support at home, birth center, or hospital • One postpartum follow-up visit for processing your birth story, breastfeeding support, and newborn care guidance

$1,500.00


USD Flat rate


Learn more
